label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's migration or business strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of platform or strategy long-term viability

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity or fitness

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative cost or performance comparison

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of the five-criteria migration decision framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative installed base or market statistic

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment by Aberdeen analysts

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of industry structure and migration dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Comparison of migration options across criteria

label: Benchmarking
definition: Quantitative cost comparison across migration options

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of IBM pricing documents and published statistics

label: Field Research
definition: Primary interviews with System/36 owners and MIS executives

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; direct IBM data or field interview confirmation

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Reasonable basis with analyst judgment

label: Low Confidence
definition: Directional judgment with limited evidence

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources

label: Declining
definition: Technology in active use but losing market share and support

label: Mature
definition: Technology widely deployed and stable

label: Emerging
definition: Technology gaining adoption

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer actively developed or supported

label: Active
definition: Technology currently in active use
